experiences.description: Leading full-stack development for AI-powered government services platform, architecting and developing multiple high-impact applications driving significant business growth. Built comprehensive marketing website generating hundreds of thousands of dollars in daily revenue through strategic SEO optimization and Google Ads integration, creating conversion-optimized landing pages and user funnels. Developed server-side rendered Next.js website with advanced performance optimization, achieving superior Core Web Vitals scores and search engine rankings that drive organic traffic and customer acquisition. Implemented sophisticated tracking and analytics infrastructure using Google Tag Manager (GTM4) for comprehensive conversion tracking, A/B testing, and marketing campaign performance optimization across multiple touchpoints. Architected and built end-to-end customer portal for US passport application services, enabling streamlined new passport applications and renewal processes with AI-powered assistance features. Developed intelligent document validation system using machine learning algorithms to verify passport application documents before submission, reducing processing errors and improving approval rates. Created AI-powered conversational interface and chatbot using natural language processing to guide customers through complex passport application requirements, providing real-time assistance and ensuring accurate information submission. Implemented robust backend infrastructure using Node.js and PostgreSQL for secure handling of sensitive government document processing, maintaining HIPAA-level security standards and data protection protocols. Built responsive, accessibility-compliant frontend interfaces using Next.js, styled-components, and modern CSS techniques for optimal user experience across all devices. Established comprehensive data scraping and integration pipeline with US State Department systems for real-time passport application status tracking and government form synchronization. Developed automated PDF generation system for official passport application forms, ensuring compliance with federal formatting requirements and reducing manual processing overhead. Integrated advanced AI features including form auto-completion, intelligent field validation, and personalized user guidance to minimize application errors and improve customer satisfaction. Technologies used: Next.js, React.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AI/ML integration, natural language processing, document validation algorithms, styled-components, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads API, SEO optimization, server-side rendering, responsive design, government API integration, PDF generation, data scraping, security compliance, and modern DevOps practices.

Led comprehensive technology company delivering cutting-edge software solutions for startups and enterprises, driving early-stage growth through strategic technical leadership and hands-on development across multiple technology stacks and industry verticals. Spearheaded end-to-end development of web and mobile applications using React.js, React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, and MongoDB, delivering tailored solutions for diverse clients across healthcare, fitness, blockchain, and e-commerce industries. Architected and developed advanced AI and Machine Learning solutions focusing on Natural Language Processing (NLP), Deep Learning, and Large Language Model (LLM) integration, creating intelligent systems including conversational AI platforms, AI-powered search engines, and automated response optimization frameworks. Built sophisticated mobile applications for iOS and Android using React Native, implementing critical features including push notifications, offline capabilities, real-time data synchronization, location-based services, and secure payment processing through Firebase, Google Maps API, and Stripe integrations. Developed complex Web3 and blockchain solutions utilizing Ethereum, smart contracts, decentralized applications (dApps), and cryptocurrency integration, creating platforms for environmental crowdfunding, NFT marketplaces, and blockchain-based data analytics systems. Created innovative VR and AR experiences including Oculus VR casting features using React Native, Node.js, WebRTC, C++, and JNI integration, pioneering immersive technology solutions for next-generation user experiences. Engineered scalable cloud infrastructure using AWS services including Lambda functions, DynamoDB, S3, and CloudFront, implementing serverless architectures, real-time data processing, and automated deployment pipelines for high-traffic applications. Built comprehensive healthcare technology solutions including HIPAA-compliant telemedicine platforms, medication-assisted treatment applications, patient consent management systems, and electronic health record integrations serving thousands of patients and healthcare providers. Developed sophisticated 3D visualization and spatial computing applications enabling real-time collaborative room planning, property management, and shared living optimization through advanced WebGL rendering and real-time synchronization technologies. Implemented advanced payment processing and financial technology solutions integrating Stripe, automated billing systems, subscription management, marketplace payment flows, and secure transaction processing for various business models. Created multi-tenant SaaS platforms with role-based access control, real-time collaboration features, advanced analytics dashboards, and scalable database architectures supporting thousands of concurrent users across multiple industries. Developed AI-powered content management and automation systems including intelligent form filling, document validation, automated workflow management, and machine learning-driven user assistance reducing manual processing overhead by 60%. Built comprehensive API ecosystems and microservices architectures enabling seamless third-party integrations, real-time data synchronization, and scalable backend services supporting complex business logic and high-volume transaction processing. Established robust DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, automated testing frameworks, performance monitoring, security compliance, and disaster recovery protocols ensuring 99.9% platform availability and enterprise-grade reliability. Led cross-functional teams implementing agile development methodologies, technical mentorship programs, and innovative solution development processes driving measurable impacts on client revenue growth, operational efficiency, and competitive market positioning. Technologies mastered: React.js, React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS cloud services, AI/ML frameworks, blockchain technologies, WebRTC, 3D graphics, payment processing, healthcare compliance, real-time systems, microservices architecture, and modern DevOps practices.

Developed high-impact applications and infrastructure solutions at Facebook, serving 2.8+ billion users globally through innovative VR technology, News Feed optimization, and scalable backend systems. Built comprehensive Oculus VR ecosystem including React Native companion app for iOS and Android with advanced features such as live streaming, screen mirroring from Oculus Quest/Go to Facebook platform, mixed reality capture capabilities, and abuse reporting systems for VR social experiences. Implemented sophisticated WebRTC-based streaming infrastructure enabling seamless real-time video transmission from Oculus headsets to React Native mobile applications and Chromecast/TV devices, creating cross-platform VR content sharing experiences. Developed critical Facebook News Feed backend services using advanced data processing algorithms, building scalable content delivery systems that optimize feed ranking, personalization, and real-time content distribution for billions of daily active users. Architected and implemented GraphQL live queries and subscription systems migrating legacy data fetching infrastructure to real-time updates, improving content loading performance by 35% and enabling instant feed updates without page refreshes. Built comprehensive C++ client applications for Facebook data centers performing end-to-end testing and optimization of News Feed services, ensuring system reliability, performance benchmarking, and quality assurance for mission-critical infrastructure serving global user base. Developed React-based content management interfaces and administrative tools enabling Facebook teams to efficiently manage content moderation, user safety features, and platform operations with intuitive user experiences and robust workflow automation. Implemented advanced state management solutions using Redux for complex application architectures, managing real-time data synchronization, user interactions, and cross-platform state consistency across web and mobile platforms. Created sophisticated A/B testing frameworks and experimentation infrastructure enabling data-driven product decisions, feature rollouts, and performance optimization across Facebook's suite of products and services. Built secure RESTful APIs and real-time data pipelines ensuring efficient communication between frontend interfaces and backend services while maintaining strict security protocols and data privacy compliance for sensitive user information. Developed Android-specific features including HLS video streaming integration, VOIP stack implementation, and native mobile optimizations enhancing Oculus companion app performance and user experience on mobile devices. Implemented comprehensive testing strategies including unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing frameworks achieving 90% code coverage and ensuring reliable software deployment across Facebook's production infrastructure. Collaborated with cross-functional teams including product managers, designers, data scientists, and infrastructure engineers to deliver innovative features, optimize user experiences, and maintain Facebook's technical excellence standards. Established performance monitoring and analytics systems tracking application metrics, user engagement patterns, and system performance indicators enabling continuous optimization and proactive issue resolution for large-scale production systems. Technologies used: React.js, React Native, Node.js, GraphQL, Redux, C++, WebRTC, Android development, iOS development, TypeScript, real-time systems, data center infrastructure, A/B testing platforms, RESTful APIs, performance optimization, cross-platform development, VR/AR technologies, and large-scale distributed systems.

Developed enterprise-scale communication applications at Microsoft serving 300+ million Skype users globally, building cross-platform solutions across multiple product teams including Skype Consumer, Remote Desktop, and Microsoft Mediaroom. Led comprehensive Android application development for Remote Desktop Client using Android SDK, implementing custom UI widgets, designing MVP architecture patterns, and creating Material Design-compliant interfaces optimized for enterprise remote access scenarios. Architected and implemented sophisticated JNI C++/Java integration layers using Android NDK, enabling seamless cross-platform communication between native C++ libraries and Java applications, reducing Remote Desktop connection failures by 10% through optimized host machine discovery protocols. Built advanced SQLite database implementations with intelligent caching strategies for offline data storage, message synchronization, and user presence management ensuring reliable Skype functionality even during network interruptions. Developed comprehensive telemetry and analytics systems for A/B testing, quality improvement, and crash collection across Android applications, implementing automated bug reporting workflows and user feedback mechanisms that improved application stability and user satisfaction metrics. Created scalable RDP (Remote Desktop Protocol) client frontend using MVP architectural principles, enabling secure enterprise remote access with optimized rendering performance and responsive user interactions for business-critical remote work scenarios. Implemented Azure cloud integration for remote application clients, building distributed systems architecture supporting enterprise-scale remote desktop deployments with secure authentication, session management, and resource optimization. Designed and deployed beta/alpha testing infrastructure for Android applications, establishing automated build pipelines, continuous integration workflows, and quality assurance processes reducing deployment time and improving release reliability. Built cross-platform connection modules using C++ for host machine discovery, implementing network protocols and communication algorithms that enhanced Remote Desktop reliability and connection speed across diverse network environments. Developed comprehensive unit testing frameworks and automated testing solutions ensuring code quality, regression prevention, and reliable software deployment across multiple Microsoft product lines serving millions of users. Established CI/CD build infrastructure and deployment pipelines for Android applications, implementing automated testing, code quality checks, and streamlined release processes supporting rapid feature development and bug fix deployment. Created advanced crash collection and diagnostic systems for Android applications using both C++ and Java implementations, enabling proactive issue identification, performance monitoring, and user experience optimization. Implemented HockeyApp integration for beta testing, crash reporting, and application distribution, streamlining developer workflows and improving application quality through comprehensive testing and feedback collection processes. Developed Skype Consumer frontend features including bug reporting interfaces, user feedback systems, and backend service integration using React and TypeScript, connecting with Node.js services for real-time communication and data synchronization. Built Microsoft Mediaroom automation and testing frameworks, developing comprehensive test infrastructure for client software validation, quality assurance, and continuous integration supporting enterprise media streaming solutions. Technologies used: Android SDK, Java, C++, JNI/NDK integration, SQLite, RxJava, MVP architecture, Material Design, React.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Azure cloud services, Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP), telemetry systems, automated testing, CI/CD pipelines, cross-platform development, and enterprise application architecture.

projects.name: EarthFund
projects.description: Architected and developed a comprehensive decentralized ecosystem for environmental fundraising, comprising three interconnected platforms: EarthFund crowdfunding platform, 1Earth cryptocurrency marketplace, and EarthFund Foundation DAO governance system. Built groundbreaking blockchain-based fundraising platform enabling global community participation in planet-saving and world-changing environmental projects through cutting-edge Web3 technology and decentralized governance mechanisms. Developed full-stack decentralized application (dApp) using Next.js frontend with seamless Web3 wallet integration supporting MetaMask, WalletConnect, and other major crypto wallets for frictionless user onboarding and transaction management. Implemented sophisticated smart contract integration using Web3.js and useDApp hooks for real-time blockchain interactions, enabling secure decentralized transactions, automated fund distribution, and transparent project funding mechanisms. Architected scalable serverless backend infrastructure using AWS Lambda functions, DynamoDB for high-performance data storage, and Node.js with TypeORM for robust database management and blockchain data synchronization. Built comprehensive cryptocurrency marketplace for 1Earth token trading with real-time price feeds, liquidity management, and automated market maker (AMM) integration for seamless token exchange and staking rewards. Developed Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO) governance platform enabling community-driven decision making, proposal voting, and transparent treasury management through blockchain-based voting mechanisms and smart contract execution. Implemented real-time staking functionality allowing users to stake 1Earth tokens, earn rewards, and participate in platform governance while contributing to environmental project funding through tokenized incentive structures. Created responsive, mobile-first user interface ensuring optimal user experience across all devices, with intuitive navigation for complex Web3 interactions and simplified onboarding for traditional users entering the decentralized finance (DeFi) space. Built comprehensive admin dashboard for project creators to submit environmental initiatives, track funding progress, manage milestone-based fund releases, and engage with community supporters through integrated communication tools. Established robust security protocols including multi-signature wallet integration, smart contract auditing procedures, and comprehensive testing frameworks to ensure platform integrity and user fund protection. Integrated advanced analytics and reporting system tracking platform metrics, environmental impact measurements, funding allocation transparency, and community engagement statistics for stakeholder visibility. Developed automated compliance and KYC integration for regulatory adherence while maintaining decentralized principles and user privacy protection. Technologies used: Next.js, React.js, Web3.js, useDApp, TypeScript, Node.js, TypeORM, PostgreSQL, AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, AWS Serverless, smart contracts, blockchain integration, cryptocurrency trading, DAO governance, DeFi protocols, MetaMask integration, real-time staking, tokenomics, environmental impact tracking, and decentralized application architecture.

projects.name: YogaJoint Platform
projects.description: Architected and developed a comprehensive multi-location fitness platform for YogaJoint, a distinguished Florida-based yoga studio chain operating across nine locations, delivering transformative digital solutions through strategic technology integration. Built full-stack fitness ecosystem including SEO-optimized marketing website, advanced class booking system, and innovative SHIFT mobile application with cutting-edge social discovery features. Developed scalable multi-tenant architecture supporting centralized database management for all studio locations while enabling location-specific class scheduling, instructor management, and real-time availability tracking across downtown, Hollywood, and Miami studios. Implemented sophisticated class booking system with visual mat selection interface allowing users to view studio layouts, see occupied mats, and book specific positions for enhanced user experience and social interaction during yoga sessions. Created innovative social discovery feature enabling users to follow friends, see their class attendance, and book adjacent mats for shared workout experiences, significantly increasing user engagement and retention rates. Built comprehensive mobile application using React Native with extensive component reusability between web and mobile platforms, ensuring consistent user experience and efficient development workflow across all touchpoints. Integrated Stripe payment processing for automated billing, credit card management, subscription handling, refund processing, and seamless transaction management supporting multiple membership tiers and pricing models. Developed advanced reservation system with waitlist functionality, automatic notifications for class availability, and intelligent booking algorithms to maximize class capacity utilization and customer satisfaction. Implemented on-demand video streaming platform using AWS Lambda and serverless architecture for scalable video delivery, providing free and premium content for home practice and supplementary training programs. Built robust referral system allowing members to earn credits through friend invitations, gamifying user acquisition and creating viral growth mechanics for business expansion across multiple studio locations. Created comprehensive administrative dashboard enabling studio owners to manage content, update class schedules, monitor attendance analytics, track revenue metrics, and oversee operations without requiring technical expertise. Developed real-time analytics and reporting system providing insights on class popularity, member engagement, revenue tracking, and operational KPIs for data-driven business decisions and studio optimization. Integrated guest pass functionality enabling members to bring visitors, expanding customer reach and providing trial experiences for potential new members through seamless app-based guest management. Implemented teacher training program enrollment system with automated workflow management, certification tracking, and instructor onboarding processes to support studio growth and instructor development initiatives. Built responsive web platform with advanced SEO optimization, marketing automation, and conversion tracking that significantly enhanced the studio's online presence and drove substantial growth in marketing and sales efforts. Technologies used: React.js, React Native, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS Lambda, AWS serverless architecture, Stripe API, video streaming infrastructure, real-time notifications, social features, multi-tenant architecture, payment processing, analytics dashboard, SEO optimization, mobile-first design, cross-platform development, and scalable cloud infrastructure.

projects.name: BicycleHealth
projects.description: Developed comprehensive React Native telemedicine application for BicycleHealth, revolutionizing opioid use disorder treatment by improving healthcare accessibility by 60% through innovative mobile-first addiction recovery platform. Built HIPAA-compliant healthcare application using TypeScript and React Native, serving thousands of patients struggling with opioid addiction while connecting them with specialized healthcare providers through secure telemedicine infrastructure. Architected custom Zoom SDK integration with React Native wrapper, enabling seamless video and audio consultations directly within the mobile app, eliminating external platform dependencies and creating unified patient experience for medical appointments. Implemented comprehensive appointment scheduling system allowing patients to book, reschedule, and join virtual appointments with addiction specialists, primary care physicians, and mental health counselors through integrated Zoom meeting functionality. Developed secure prescription management system enabling healthcare providers to prescribe medication-assisted treatment (MAT) medications directly through the app, with real-time prescription tracking and pharmacy integration for streamlined addiction treatment workflows. Built robust patient task management system with personalized care plans, medication reminders, recovery milestones tracking, and treatment progress monitoring to support long-term addiction recovery and improve patient outcomes. Implemented advanced biometric authentication using Face ID integration for secure app access while maintaining patient privacy and ensuring quick, convenient login for users managing sensitive addiction treatment information. Created real-time chat support system with intelligent categorization algorithms allowing patients to connect with support staff instantly, with backend triage functionality routing queries to appropriate healthcare professionals based on urgency and issue type. Integrated Redux for comprehensive state management handling complex healthcare workflows, patient data synchronization, appointment scheduling, and real-time updates across the telemedicine platform. Implemented Firebase backend integration for real-time data synchronization, secure patient information storage, push notifications for appointment reminders, and seamless cross-device patient experience. Developed comprehensive billing and payment processing system using Stripe integration, enabling patients to manage insurance information, copays, treatment costs, and subscription-based care plans through secure mobile payment infrastructure. Built extensive resource center with educational content, FAQ system, addiction recovery resources, and treatment information helping patients understand their treatment options and supporting long-term recovery success. Created persistent support chat interface accessible from all app screens ensuring patients can receive immediate assistance during critical moments in their addiction recovery journey. Implemented GraphQL API integration for efficient data fetching, reducing app load times by 40% and providing optimal performance for patients accessing critical healthcare services in emergency situations. Developed comprehensive analytics and reporting system tracking patient engagement, treatment adherence, appointment completion rates, and recovery outcomes for healthcare providers and clinical research initiatives. Technologies used: React Native, TypeScript, Redux, Firebase, GraphQL APIs, Zoom SDK integration, Face ID authentication, Stripe payment processing, HIPAA compliance, telemedicine infrastructure, healthcare workflows, prescription management, real-time chat, push notifications, biometric security, and mobile healthcare platforms.

projects.name: Wikichat
projects.description: Created conversational AI for Wikipedia using Langchain, Amazon Bedrock, OpenAI APIs, and Astra DB for vector storage. Implemented RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) system to retrieve and store Wikipedia vectors for real-time AI-powered responses. Built with Python backend and React frontend, utilizing advanced NLP techniques and semantic search capabilities.

projects.name: WikiSearch
projects.description: Engineered a large-scale AI-powered search engine by vectorizing the entire Wikipedia dataset (6+ million articles) using OpenAI's embedding models and storing in Apache Cassandra database for distributed, high-performance vector storage. Built sophisticated semantic search platform enabling context-aware queries that understand user intent beyond keyword matching, delivering more relevant and intelligent search results. Developed full-stack application with modern frontend interface allowing users to perform natural language queries and receive semantically similar content through advanced vector similarity algorithms. Implemented robust ETL pipeline to process, chunk, and embed millions of Wikipedia articles, managing data preprocessing, text normalization, and vector generation at scale. Architected distributed vector database infrastructure using Cassandra's wide-column storage for optimal vector retrieval performance and horizontal scalability. Created efficient vector indexing and similarity search algorithms supporting real-time queries across massive embedding datasets with sub-second response times. Built intelligent search ranking system combining vector similarity scores with content relevance metrics for enhanced search accuracy. Implemented caching layers and query optimization strategies to handle high-volume concurrent searches while maintaining performance. Developed responsive web interface with advanced search features including filters, result clustering, and semantic relationship visualization. Integrated machine learning workflows for continuous model improvement and embedding quality optimization. Established monitoring and analytics dashboard to track search performance, user behavior, and system metrics. Technologies used: Python, OpenAI Embeddings API, Apache Cassandra, vector databases, semantic search, natural language processing (NLP), machine learning, ETL pipelines, distributed systems, React.js frontend, vector similarity algorithms, text preprocessing, data engineering, and scalable cloud infrastructure.

projects.name: Google Vertex AI Agent Extension
projects.description: Built extension integrating Google Vertex AI with Astra DB and Gemini Models for enhanced AI capabilities. Developed using Python, FastAPI, and Google Cloud Platform services. Optimized AI task handling through intelligent prompt engineering and caching strategies, improving automated response accuracy by 40%. Implemented comprehensive monitoring and logging for production deployment.

projects.name: Observability for LLM-Based Applications
projects.description: Implemented observability framework for RAG chatbot using Fiddler AI monitoring platform. Developed real-time monitoring for model performance, fairness metrics, and drift detection. Built with Python, integrated GPT models, and created custom dashboards for tracking LLM behavior. Established framework for prompt optimization and A/B testing of different model configurations.

projects.name: Astra Block
projects.description: Built a comprehensive Ethereum blockchain explorer (Etherscan clone) with real-time data extraction, transformation, and loading capabilities for crypto and NFT marketplace analytics. Developed full-stack application using React.js with TypeScript frontend, Node.js backend, and GraphQL API for seamless client-server communication. Implemented advanced blockchain data processing to decode smart contract events, maintain complete blockchain transaction history, and track assets across wallet addresses. Created intuitive search functionality supporting multiple filter types including transaction hash, block address, and token address queries. Built real-time transaction volume visualization dashboard with interactive charts and graphs. Developed detailed transaction and block explorers allowing users to drill down from high-level blockchain activity to individual transaction details including from/to addresses, transaction values, gas fees, and comprehensive transaction logs. Integrated DataStax platform for robust data storage and retrieval, enabling real-time insights into Ethereum blockchain activity. Architected scalable ETL pipeline for continuous blockchain data ingestion and processing. Implemented responsive UI/UX design with TypeScript for type safety and enhanced developer experience. Technologies used: React.js, TypeScript, Node.js, GraphQL, DataStax, Ethereum Web3 APIs, real-time data streaming, blockchain analytics, smart contract interaction, and modern frontend/backend development practices.

projects.name: DataStax Marketing Website
projects.description: Architected and developed a high-performance, server-side rendered marketing website for DataStax using Next.js, achieving optimal SEO performance and enhanced user experience. Built enterprise-grade marketing platform with seamless integrations including Marketo for marketing automation, ZoomInfo for lead intelligence, and ABTasty for A/B testing and conversion optimization. Implemented Sanity CMS as headless content management system, enabling non-technical content editors to manage website content independently through intuitive live editing capabilities. Developed real-time content preview and editing functionality that eliminated developer bottlenecks, allowing marketing teams to update content, landing pages, and campaigns instantly without deployment cycles. Created responsive, mobile-first design with optimized Core Web Vitals achieving superior page load speeds and search engine rankings. Established robust CI/CD pipeline for automated deployment and content synchronization between CMS and production environment. Implemented advanced SEO optimization strategies including dynamic meta tags, structured data markup, and automated sitemap generation. Built modular component architecture with reusable design system components for consistent branding and rapid page development. Integrated marketing analytics and conversion tracking through multiple platforms for comprehensive campaign performance monitoring. Developed custom API integrations to synchronize lead data between Marketo, ZoomInfo, and internal CRM systems. Technologies used: Next.js, React.js, TypeScript, Sanity CMS, Marketo API, ZoomInfo integration, ABTasty SDK, server-side rendering (SSR), static site generation (SSG), responsive web design, SEO optimization, marketing automation, lead generation, and modern JAMstack architecture.

projects.name: Loadsrunner Fleet Management Solution
projects.description: Developed comprehensive B2B logistics platform serving small, medium, and large trucking fleets with real-time load booking and fleet management capabilities. Built scalable web application using Next.js and React Context for state management, serving thousands of active fleet managers and dispatch houses across the transportation industry. Architected live loadboard system enabling real-time load discovery, bidding, and booking functionality with dynamic pricing and availability updates using SWR hooks for optimal data fetching and caching. Implemented sophisticated fleet management dashboard allowing operators to track vehicle locations, driver assignments, load status, route optimization, and operational efficiency metrics across entire fleet operations. Developed multi-tenant architecture supporting different fleet sizes from owner-operators to enterprise-level logistics companies, with role-based access control and customizable dashboards for various user types. Built comprehensive payment processing system integrating Stripe APIs for automated invoicing, payment collection, and financial transaction management between dispatch houses and fleet operators. Created intuitive user interface using Material-UI (MUI) component library ensuring consistent design system, responsive layouts, and accessibility compliance across all platform features. Implemented real-time data synchronization for load updates, driver status changes, and fleet tracking using WebSocket connections and optimistic UI updates for seamless user experience. Developed advanced search and filtering capabilities for loadboard with geolocation-based matching, route optimization, and load compatibility algorithms to maximize fleet utilization and profitability. Built robust reporting and analytics dashboard providing fleet managers with insights on revenue tracking, driver performance, fuel efficiency, and operational KPIs for data-driven decision making. Integrated third-party logistics APIs for real-time freight data, route planning, and industry standard load posting protocols ensuring comprehensive market coverage. Established automated workflow systems for load assignment, driver notifications, document management, and compliance tracking to streamline dispatch operations and reduce manual overhead. Technologies used: Next.js, React.js, React Context API, SWR hooks, Material-UI (MUI), TypeScript, Stripe Payment API, real-time data synchronization, WebSocket integration, geolocation services, route optimization algorithms, multi-tenant architecture, role-based access control, B2B payment processing, logistics APIs, fleet tracking systems, and responsive web design.

projects.name: Midato Healt
projects.description: Developed enterprise-grade consent management platform for Washington State healthcare system, enabling secure patient consent collection and medical record release authorization across state healthcare networks. Built HIPAA-compliant web application using React.js frontend and Node.js backend, serving thousands of healthcare providers and patients throughout Washington State's medical infrastructure. Architected robust serverless backend infrastructure using AWS Lambda functions for scalable, secure processing of sensitive medical consent data while maintaining strict healthcare compliance and data protection standards. Implemented comprehensive patient consent workflow system allowing healthcare providers to digitally collect, track, and manage patient authorizations for medical record sharing between hospitals, clinics, specialists, and insurance providers. Developed secure digital signature integration and identity verification processes ensuring legal validity of electronic consent forms while maintaining audit trails for regulatory compliance and healthcare record keeping requirements. Built role-based access control system supporting multiple user types including patients, healthcare providers, administrative staff, and state regulators with granular permission management for sensitive medical information access. Created real-time consent status tracking dashboard enabling healthcare providers to instantly verify patient authorization status before releasing medical records, reducing processing delays and ensuring compliance with state privacy regulations. Implemented automated consent expiration management with notification systems alerting patients and providers when consent authorizations require renewal, maintaining continuous compliance with Washington State healthcare regulations. Developed comprehensive audit logging and compliance reporting system tracking all consent activities, user access patterns, and data sharing events for state regulatory oversight and healthcare compliance monitoring. Built secure API integration layer connecting with existing Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems, hospital management platforms, and state healthcare databases for seamless consent verification and medical record release workflows. Implemented advanced data encryption, secure transmission protocols, and multi-factor authentication ensuring patient privacy protection and compliance with HIPAA, HITECH, and Washington State healthcare privacy laws. Created responsive, accessibility-compliant user interface following WCAG guidelines and healthcare usability standards, ensuring platform accessibility for patients with disabilities and healthcare workers across diverse technical skill levels. Developed automated workflow management system streamlining consent collection processes, reducing administrative overhead by 60%, and improving patient experience through simplified digital consent procedures. Established comprehensive backup and disaster recovery protocols using AWS infrastructure ensuring 99.9% platform availability and secure data preservation for critical healthcare consent management operations. Technologies used: React.js, Node.js, AWS Lambda, AWS serverless architecture, HIPAA compliance, digital signatures, identity verification, healthcare APIs, EHR integration, audit logging, data encryption, multi-factor authentication, role-based access control, regulatory compliance, healthcare workflow automation, and secure cloud infrastructure.

projects.name: Eternally
projects.description: Architected and developed Eternally, a revolutionary social media platform designed to redefine online user experiences through innovative features and seamless cross-platform functionality. Built comprehensive social networking ecosystem using React Native for mobile applications (iOS and Android) and React.js for web platform, ensuring consistent user experience across all devices with shared component architecture. Developed advanced posting and timeline system with real-time content synchronization, intelligent feed algorithms, and dynamic content rendering supporting multimedia posts, stories, and user-generated content with optimized performance for high-volume social interactions. Implemented sophisticated messaging infrastructure with real-time chat capabilities, scheduled messaging functionality allowing users to send communications at optimal timing, and end-to-end encryption ensuring secure private conversations between platform users. Created innovative video recording and sharing features with in-app camera integration, video editing capabilities, live streaming support, and cloud-based video storage using AWS infrastructure for scalable multimedia content delivery. Built interactive Q&A session functionality enabling dynamic community engagement, live questioning features, real-time audience participation, and gamified social interactions fostering meaningful connections between users and content creators. Developed streamlined user onboarding system with email-based signup process, social authentication options, profile customization features, and intelligent user matching algorithms to help new users discover relevant content and connections immediately. Implemented flexible subscription and storage management system offering free tier with 1GB storage and premium subscription plans with expanded storage options, advanced features, and enhanced user experiences through Stripe payment processing integration. Architected scalable backend infrastructure using PostgreSQL for robust data management, AWS cloud services for global content delivery, and TypeScript for type-safe development ensuring platform reliability and maintainable codebase. Created innovative donation integration system enabling users to support causes they care about directly through the platform, with secure payment processing, transparent fund tracking, and social impact measurement tools. Built comprehensive content moderation and safety features including automated content filtering, community reporting systems, and privacy controls ensuring safe, inclusive social environment for all platform users. Developed advanced analytics and engagement tracking system providing users with insights into their social impact, content performance, and community connections while maintaining strict privacy protection standards. Implemented push notification system with intelligent timing algorithms, personalized content recommendations, and user preference management ensuring optimal engagement without notification fatigue. Created responsive web companion application with feature parity to mobile apps, enabling seamless cross-device social media experience and expanding platform accessibility across desktop and mobile environments. Established robust CI/CD pipeline with automated testing, cross-platform deployment, and performance monitoring ensuring reliable platform operation and rapid feature iteration for competitive social media market. Technologies used: React Native, React.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS cloud infrastructure, Stripe payment processing, real-time messaging, video streaming, push notifications, content delivery networks (CDN), cross-platform development, social media algorithms, multimedia processing, secure authentication, and scalable social networking architecture.

projects.name: LuxPark
projects.description: Developed LuxPark, a comprehensive B2B marketplace platform revolutionizing the trucking industry by connecting parking space owners with truck drivers through an innovative 'Airbnb for truck parking' model. Built full-stack marketplace ecosystem using React.js frontend, Node.js backend, and GraphQL API architecture, serving thousands of truck drivers and parking facility owners across major transportation corridors. Architected sophisticated two-sided marketplace with dual user interfaces: property owner dashboard for listing and managing parking spaces, and driver mobile application for discovering, booking, and paying for secure truck parking spots in real-time. Implemented advanced geolocation and mapping integration enabling truck drivers to search for available parking spots by location, route optimization, amenities, security features, and pricing, with real-time availability updates and GPS-guided navigation to selected facilities. Developed comprehensive listing management system allowing parking owners to create detailed facility profiles with photos, amenities (WiFi, restrooms, security cameras, lighting), capacity management, dynamic pricing controls, and availability scheduling for optimal revenue generation. Built robust reservation and booking engine with real-time availability checking, instant booking confirmation, flexible cancellation policies, and automated check-in/check-out processes streamlining the parking experience for long-haul truck drivers. Integrated Stripe payment processing platform for secure, automated transactions including upfront payments, security deposits, split payments between platform and property owners, automated payouts, and comprehensive financial reporting for marketplace participants. Implemented Redux state management for complex marketplace workflows including search filters, booking processes, user authentication, real-time data synchronization, and optimistic UI updates ensuring smooth user experience across platform interactions. Developed PostgreSQL database architecture with optimized SQL queries supporting high-volume concurrent bookings, complex geospatial searches, pricing calculations, and real-time availability tracking across thousands of parking facilities nationwide. Created intelligent search and recommendation engine using machine learning algorithms to suggest optimal parking locations based on driver routes, historical preferences, pricing sensitivity, and facility ratings improving booking conversion rates by 40%. Built comprehensive review and rating system enabling drivers to rate facilities and owners to rate customers, creating trust mechanisms essential for two-sided marketplace success and quality assurance. Implemented advanced notification system with SMS and push notifications for booking confirmations, check-in reminders, payment alerts, and emergency communications ensuring reliable communication for time-sensitive trucking operations. Developed comprehensive analytics dashboard for parking owners providing insights on occupancy rates, revenue optimization, peak demand periods, and competitive pricing analysis enabling data-driven business decisions. Created mobile-first responsive design optimized for truck drivers using devices in various lighting conditions and environments, with large touch targets, simplified navigation, and offline capability for areas with poor cellular coverage. Built robust fraud prevention and security measures including identity verification for both drivers and property owners, secure payment processing, dispute resolution workflows, and comprehensive insurance integration protecting marketplace participants. Established scalable infrastructure supporting high-traffic periods during peak shipping seasons, major holidays, and supply chain disruptions when truck parking demand surges significantly across transportation networks. Technologies used: React.js, Node.js, Redux, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, SQL optimization, Stripe payment processing, geolocation APIs, real-time notifications, marketplace architecture, two-sided platform development, mobile-responsive design, machine learning recommendations, fraud prevention, and scalable cloud infrastructure.

projects.name: Roomie
projects.description: Architected and developed Roomie, a groundbreaking 3D room planning platform revolutionizing shared living experiences for university students, city apartment residents, and property management companies through innovative spatial visualization and collaborative design tools. Built comprehensive full-stack application using Next.js and React.js frontend with Spring Hibernate backend, serving thousands of students, property managers, and educational institutions seeking efficient dormitory and apartment management solutions. Developed sophisticated 3D modeling engine enabling residents to visualize, plan, and customize their living spaces with photorealistic furniture placement, room measurements, and spatial optimization tools that streamline move-in processes and reduce roommate conflicts. Implemented complex dynamic item management system allowing users to add, remove, and modify furniture items in real-time 3D environments while maintaining data consistency across refresh cycles, user sessions, and collaborative editing scenarios. Engineered advanced position and rotation persistence algorithms storing precise 3D coordinates, object orientations, and spatial relationships in PostgreSQL database with optimized data structures ensuring accurate reconstruction of room layouts across multiple user interactions and system updates. Created multi-tenant architecture supporting diverse user types including university students planning dorm rooms, city residents designing shared apartments, school administrators managing bulk move-in processes, and property managers showcasing units to prospective tenants. Built real-time collaborative editing functionality enabling multiple roommates to simultaneously plan and modify shared living spaces, with conflict resolution algorithms, user presence indicators, and synchronized 3D viewport updates for seamless teamwork. Developed comprehensive communication platform integrated with 3D room planning allowing roommates to discuss furniture arrangements, share design ideas, leave comments on specific room areas, and coordinate move-in logistics through contextual messaging systems. Implemented intelligent furniture catalog with 3D model library featuring accurate dimensions, realistic textures, and physics-based placement validation ensuring furniture arrangements respect room boundaries, doorways, and accessibility requirements. Created advanced measurement and spatial analysis tools providing users with precise room dimensions, furniture clearance calculations, optimal traffic flow suggestions, and space utilization recommendations maximizing functional living area efficiency. Built comprehensive property management dashboard enabling administrators to oversee multiple properties, track room occupancy, manage furniture inventory, generate layout reports, and streamline tenant onboarding processes through automated room assignment workflows. Developed responsive 3D rendering engine optimized for various devices and browser capabilities, with progressive loading, level-of-detail optimization, and graceful degradation ensuring consistent user experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile platforms. Implemented sophisticated user authentication and authorization system supporting role-based access control for students, administrators, property managers, and educational institutions with secure data isolation and privacy protection. Created comprehensive analytics and reporting system tracking user engagement, room planning patterns, furniture preferences, and space utilization metrics providing valuable insights for property management and educational institution decision-making. Established robust data backup and version control system maintaining complete history of room layout changes, enabling users to revert to previous configurations and administrators to track modification patterns across properties. Technologies used: Next.js, React.js, Spring Framework, Hibernate ORM, PostgreSQL, 3D graphics rendering, WebGL, real-time collaboration, spatial algorithms, multi-tenant architecture, role-based access control, responsive design, property management systems, educational technology, and collaborative planning platforms.
